description: Represents the ingress configuration of an application component.

ACLs.description: The list of ACLs to apply for the ingress of this workload.
ACLs.title: ACLs

defaultACLAction.description: The default action to take for connections ingressing to this workload that do not match any of the ACLs.
defaultACLAction.title: defaultACLAction

listeners.description: The defined listeners for this ingress workload.
listeners.title: listeners

proxyAccessPolicy.description: The computed rego access policy for the proxy.
proxyAccessPolicy.title: proxyAccessPolicy

proxyContentPolicy.description: The computed rego content policy for the proxy.
proxyContentPolicy.title: proxyContentPolicy

title: AppComponentIngress
